title: hartogia lediformis
intro: Hartogia lediformis, also known as the African sandalwood or East Coast sandalwood, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The medicinal properties of Hartogia lediformis include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Hartogia lediformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
